Cardillo Documentation

  • Class PhysicsEngine

Class PhysicsEngine

  • Defined in File physics_engine.hpp

Class Documentation

class PhysicsEngine

High-level facade for building scenes and advancing the simulation.

Public Functions

PhysicsEngine()

Construct an empty engine. Call initFromConfig before stepping.

~PhysicsEngine()

Destroy owned subsystems.

explicit PhysicsEngine(const config::Config &cfg)

Construct the engine and initialize it from a simulation config.

void initFromConfig(const config::Config &cfg)

Rebuild the owned world, collision manager, timings, and pipeline from a config.

inline entt::entity addRigidBody(const RigidShape &shape, const RigidState &state, const RigidProps &props)

Create a dynamic rigid body and return its entity.

inline entt::entity addStaticBody(const RigidShape &shape, const RigidState &state)

Create a static rigid body and return its entity.

inline entt::entity addPointMass(real_t mass, const Vector3r &x0, const Vector3r &v0, real_t radius = (real_t)0.05)

Create a point mass with an optional visual radius.

inline entt::entity addObstacleHeightField(const Vector3r &position, const Quaternion4r &orientation, const std::string &exrPath, real_t x_dim, real_t y_dim, real_t z_scale = (real_t)1.0, real_t min_height = (real_t)0.0)

Spawn a static height-field obstacle from an EXR file.

inline std::vector<entt::entity> addSoftBody(const std::string &objPath, real_t stiffness, real_t damping, const Vector3r &position = Vector3r::Zero(), const Quaternion4r &orientation = Quaternion4r::Identity(), const Vector3r &linearVelocity = Vector3r::Zero(), const Vector3r &angularVelocity = Vector3r::Zero(), real_t totalMass = (real_t)0.0, real_t nodeRadius = (real_t)0.02)

Create a soft body from an OBJ mesh.

inline std::pair<entt::entity, entt::entity> createBeam(const cardillo::misc::SplinePattern &spline, const BeamCrossSection &section, const BeamSpringParams &springs, const RigidState &stateDefaults, const RigidProps &propsDefaults, size_t segments)

Sample a spline into a beam chain and return the root and tip entities.

inline std::pair<entt::entity, entt::entity> createBeams(const std::vector<const cardillo::misc::SplinePattern*> &splines, const BeamCrossSection &section, const BeamSpringParams &springs, const RigidState &stateDefaults, const RigidProps &propsDefaults, size_t segments)

Create several beams from a list of spline patterns.

void step()

Advance the simulation by the engine’s configured time step.

inline size_t addLinearDistanceConstraint(entt::entity a, entt::entity b, const Vector3r &rA_local = Vector3r::Zero(), const Vector3r &rB_local = Vector3r::Zero(), real_t stiffness = std::numeric_limits<real_t>::infinity(), real_t damping = (real_t)0)

Add a linear distance constraint between two entities.

inline size_t addRigidConstraint(entt::entity a, entt::entity b = entt::null)

Constrain two entities to the same rigid frame.

inline size_t addTranslationRotationConstraint(entt::entity a, entt::entity b, const JointFrame &frame, const Vector3r &K_trans = Vector3r::Constant(std::numeric_limits<real_t>::infinity()), const Vector3r &D_trans = Vector3r::Zero(), const Vector3r &K_rot = Vector3r::Zero(), const Vector3r &D_rot = Vector3r::Zero())

Add a six-DOF translation/rotation joint with configurable stiffness and damping.

inline size_t addTranslationalConstraint(entt::entity a, entt::entity b, const JointFrame &frame, const Vector3r &K_trans = Vector3r::Constant(std::numeric_limits<real_t>::infinity()), const Vector3r &D_trans = Vector3r::Zero())

Constrain only translation while leaving rotation free.

inline size_t addRotationConstraint(entt::entity a, entt::entity b, const JointFrame &frame, const Vector3r &K_rot = Vector3r::Constant(std::numeric_limits<real_t>::infinity()), const Vector3r &D_rot = Vector3r::Zero())

Constrain only rotation while leaving translation free.

inline size_t addHingeConstraint(entt::entity a, entt::entity b, const JointFrame &frame, real_t K_axis = (real_t)0, real_t D_axis = (real_t)0, const Vector3r &K_trans = Vector3r::Constant(std::numeric_limits<real_t>::infinity()), const Vector3r &D_trans = Vector3r::Zero())

Add a hinge joint with a single rotational axis and optional translational stiffness.

inline size_t addBeamConstraint(entt::entity a, entt::entity b, const BeamSpringParams &springs, const BeamCrossSection &section)

Add a beam constraint between two beam segment entities.

void setConstraintScalarVelocity(size_t constraintIndex, real_t v)

Set the scalar target velocity for a constraint pattern.

void setConstraintLinearVelocity(size_t constraintIndex, const Vector3r &v)

Set the translational target velocity for a constraint pattern.

void setConstraintAngularVelocity(size_t constraintIndex, const Vector3r &w)

Set the angular target velocity for a constraint pattern.

inline entt::registry &ecs()

Expose the underlying ECS registry for queries and custom systems.

inline const entt::registry &ecs() const

Expose the underlying ECS registry for queries and custom systems.

void disableCollisionBetween(entt::entity a, entt::entity b)

Disable collision checks for a specific pair.

inline void makeStatic(entt::entity e)

Convert a dynamic entity into a static one.

inline MatrixXXr getMass(entt::entity e) const

Query the mass matrix for an entity.

inline Vector3r getInertiaDiag(entt::entity e) const

Query the body-frame inertia diagonal for an entity.

inline VectorXr getPosition(entt::entity e) const

Query the generalized position vector for an entity.

inline real_t getKineticEnergy(entt::entity e) const

Query the kinetic energy for an entity.

inline void applyForce(entt::entity e, const Vector3r &f, const Vector3r &tau)

Apply a world-space force and torque to an entity.

inline void applyInertialTorque(entt::entity e, const Vector3r &tau)

Apply a pure world-space torque to an entity.

inline void setPosition(entt::entity e, const Vector3r &p)

Set the position of an entity.

inline void setOrientation(entt::entity e, const Quaternion4r &q)

Set the orientation of an entity.

inline void setLinearVelocity(entt::entity e, const Vector3r &v)

Set the linear velocity of an entity.

inline void setAngularVelocity(entt::entity e, const Vector3r &w)

Set the angular velocity of an entity.

inline void setVelocityByForce(entt::entity e, const Vector3r &v, const Vector3r &w)

Set velocity directly by force-like state input.

inline void addTrajectory(entt::entity e, std::optional<std::function<TrajectoryPose(real_t)>> positionFunc, std::optional<std::function<TrajectoryTwist(real_t)>> velocityFunc)

Attach a time-dependent trajectory callback to an entity.

template<class TSpline, std::enable_if_t<std::is_base_of_v<cardillo::misc::SplinePattern, TSpline>, int> = 0>
inline void addTrajectory(entt::entity e, const TSpline &spline, real_t period)

Attach a periodic spline trajectory to an entity.

inline void removeTrajectory(entt::entity e)

Remove an entity trajectory.

inline void setGravity(const Vector3r &g)

Set the world gravity vector.

inline const Vector3r &gravity() const

Get the world gravity vector.

inline void markStructureDirty()

Mark the world structure dirty so the next step rebuilds derived state.

inline void track(entt::entity e, const std::string &name)

Attach a tracking label to an entity for output.

void step(real_t dt)

Advance the simulation pipeline by dt seconds.

collision::CollisionCoal &collisionManager()

Access the collision manager owned by the engine.

cardillo::misc::TimingManager &timings()

Access the timing manager owned by the engine.

bool isFinished() const

Query whether the pipeline reached the configured simulation end time.
